_description: Specification for the JSON payload the Alert Tool sends to the Eidarix sync API. One payload per alert row. The Eidarix processor handles field name mapping, ID resolution (org names → Bubble IDs, topic names → Bubble IDs), and record linking.
_processing_rules: 1. ORDERING: library_item is always processed before event, event before agenda_items. Order is fixed.

2. LINKING (handled by processor, no field needed): After library_item CREATE, new ID is added to calendaritem.Agenda. After agenda_item CREATEs, their IDs are added to calendaritem.attached_agenda_items and libraryitem.Agenda_items.
3. UPDATE requires a 'match' block. CREATE must not have a 'match' block. Null or absent section = skip.
4. 'organizations' and 'chronicle_topics' are plain name strings — processor resolves to Bubble IDs.
5. 'alert_id' and 'alert_type' are for tracing only — not written to Bubble.
6. Fields marked AUTO are set by Bubble's own workflows and should NOT be included in the payload.
7. agenda_items are ALWAYS 'create' — never updated. An updated agenda means new items were added to the revised PDF; existing agendaitem records in Bubble are not mutated.

calendaritem: body (HTML description auto-generated by Bubble workflow)
AMPM from / AMPM until (derived from datetime)
Hour from / Hours until / Minutes from / Minutes until (derived from datetime)
has topic (auto-set when Topics - dt is populated)
Outlook Event ID / Outlook last sync (managed by Outlook sync)
origin (legacy field from old Bubble app)
libraryitem: News in print (set when linked to a newsreel issue)
Available To Vector Store (set by vector store workflow)
file (binary upload — we link by URL only)
agendaitem: text field for search (auto-lowercased from BA title)

calendaritem (Event).title: string — meeting/event title
calendaritem (Event).event_type: string — one of: Meeting, RFC, Effective Date, Report. Maps to the 'type' lookup field.
calendaritem (Event).location_url: string — Webex or other meeting URL, or null
calendaritem (Event).phone_and_access_code: string — dial-in number + access code, or null
calendaritem (Event).chronicle_topics: array of chronicle topic name strings
calendaritem (Event).event_description: string — plain text description of the event/change, or null

_match_fields_for_update.organization: primary org name — used to find the existing record in Bubble
_match_fields_for_update.date: YYYY-MM-DD — used to find the existing record in Bubble

libraryitem (Library Item).title: string — document or library item title
libraryitem (Library Item).url: string — direct URL to the document, or null if transcript
libraryitem (Library Item).item_type: string — one of: Agenda, Materials, Meeting Transcript, RFC, Report, Other. Maps to 'Type - DT' lookup.
libraryitem (Library Item).date: YYYY-MM-DD — document publication date or associated meeting date
libraryitem (Library Item).date_display: string — one of: Full date, Month Year, Year. Use 'Full date' when exact date is known. Note: Bubble stores this as 'Month, Year' (with comma) but use plain strings here; processor maps to Bubble option values.
libraryitem (Library Item).chronicle_topics: array of chronicle topic name strings
libraryitem (Library Item).summary: string — AI-generated document summary, or null

_match_fields_for_update.title: title string — fallback match key if URL is absent or changed

agendaitem (Agenda Item).title: string — our preliminary/BA title for the agenda item. Maps to 'BA title'.
agendaitem (Agenda Item).official_title: string — NAIC official title. Maps to 'NAIC Title'. Null if unknown.
agendaitem (Agenda Item).reference_id: string — our standardized reference ID, e.g. LATF#APF-2025-14. Maps to 'BA Ref #'. Null if unknown.
agendaitem (Agenda Item).chronicle_topics: array of chronicle topic name strings
agendaitem (Agenda Item)._action: always 'create' — agenda items are never updated in place. A revised agenda adds new items; it does not mutate existing records.
agendaitem (Agenda Item)._note: Agenda items are always linked to both the event (calendaritem.attached_agenda_items) and the library item (libraryitem.Agenda_items) by the processor.

1_new_meeting._description: New meeting announced. No document yet. Event created only.

2_updated_meeting._description: Meeting time or location changed. Event updated by matching org + date.

3_new_agenda_and_materials._description: Agenda PDF posted for the first time. Library item created, existing event updated and linked. Agenda line items created and linked to both event and library item.
3_new_agenda_and_materials._processing_order: Step 1: CREATE library_item → get ID. Step 2: UPDATE event, processor links library_item ID into event.Agenda. Step 3: CREATE each agenda_item, processor links IDs into event.attached_agenda_items and library_item.Agenda_items.

4_new_materials_no_agenda_items._description: Supporting materials posted but no individual agenda line items to extract. Library item created and linked to event.

5_updated_agenda_and_materials._description: Revised agenda PDF posted. Library item updated to point to new PDF. Event updated. Any agenda items extracted from the revised agenda are created as new records — agenda items themselves are never mutated, only added.
